name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Mobile-first hosted UI
release_notes: Refines the hosted web app for phone use with touch-friendly tab navigation, tighter mobile spacing, quieter account chips, and desktop-inspired accent presets.
notes: Adds a mobile-first web UI pass for the hosted app.
Top-level and module tabs are styled as horizontally scrollable touch-friendly pills on smaller screens.
Cards, banners, metrics, and project/focus-block panels use smaller radii, spacing, and shadows on phones so the app feels less like a squeezed desktop page.
Signed-in/access chips are quieter and truncate long emails on narrow screens.
Adds desktop-inspired accent theme names from the local app: Moss, Lagoon, Persimmon, Marigold, Iris, and Rosewood.
Streamlit primary colour now uses the Moss desktop preset for a closer default connection to the local app palette.
